summary: FASE 6 Frontend Testing Complete - Entity/Role UX, PPN/Faktur per-entity, Multi-entity sales, Bank accounts per-entity

ui_bugs.issue: Sales user login does not properly clear admin session - entity switcher shows as unlocked instead of locked for sales role
ui_bugs.details: When logging in as Sales after Admin, the session appears to retain admin privileges. Expected: locked entity switcher with 'entity-switcher-locked' testid. Actual: regular unlocked entity switcher.

ui_bugs.issue: Users tab button not clickable or not found in Admin section
ui_bugs.details: Could not navigate to Users tab to test entity assignment form. The tab button with text 'Users' or testid 'admin-tab-users-button' was not found or not clickable.

passed_tests: Entity Switcher - Admin role tag displays correctly ('· Admin')
Entity Switcher - Admin can switch between entities (ent_ksc, ent_kanda, all)
Entity Switcher - Dropdown shows all entity options correctly
Checkout - PKP entity (ent_ksc) shows 'Minta Faktur Pajak' toggle in step 3
Checkout - Faktur toggle can be enabled/disabled
Checkout - Non-PKP entity (ent_kanda) shows non-PKP note instead of toggle
Checkout - Non-PKP note displays correct text about no PPN/Faktur
Checkout - PPN calculation shows 11% for PKP entity
Checkout - PPN shows 'Non-PKP (0)' for non-PKP entity
Bank Accounts - Displays account cards with balances
Bank Accounts - Shows KPIs (Total Saldo, Saldo Bank, Saldo Kas, Belum Rekonsiliasi)
No console errors or red screens during testing

high_priority: Fix session management: Sales user login should properly clear admin session and show locked entity switcher (data-testid='entity-switcher-locked')
Fix Admin Users tab navigation: Ensure Users tab button is accessible and clickable to test entity assignment form
medium_priority: Test order creation with faktur toggle enabled to verify 'order-needs-faktur-badge' appears in OrderDetailPanel
